w:r.w:t: The Dark Forest The Little Firefly
The Kind Farmer and the Clever Cow
Pupils will learn about taking care of their belongings and wild animals in Week 10.
Pupils will learn about food of the week is Lemon in week 10.
In week 10 pupils will playing the game Letter walk .
Match the letter with the pictures(v-z).
Count and circle the correct number (24, 25).
Q.1: Where is the tomb of Allama Iqbal?
Ans: The tomb of Allama Iqbal is in Lahore.
Q.1: Which Dua do we say when we are sneezing. Ans:
Q.1: How do you see things?
We see things with our eyes.
Q.1: What is the national language of Pakistan? Ans:
is the national language of Pakistan.

Tell the names of 5 wild animals. Ans:
Tiger, Lion, Fox, Panda and Bear.
The revision of all the previous work done this week is complete.
